## Description
Please describe the changes proposed in this Pull Request, including the problem solved and the implementation details.

## Related Issues
Fixes #[issue_number]
Closes #[issue_number]

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code style update (formatting, local variables)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, no API changes)
- [ ] Chore / Dependency update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/cloakey/cloakey/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`cargo fmt` passes locally).
- [ ] I have run static analysis checks (`cargo clippy` passes locally with no warnings).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`cargo test` passes locally).
- [ ] My commit messages follow the **Conventional Commits** specification.
- [ ] I have signed off my commits using the `-s` flag (**Developer Certificate of Origin**).

## Verification Details
Please describe the hardware and OS environments where you tested these changes (e.g., Windows 11 Home, Windows 10 Pro) and detail how you verified them.
